title: Fix archive incomplete gates despite complete gate status

tasks.title: Add failing regression coverage for authoritative complete gates with stale/incomplete archive projection and for genuinely incomplete gates still blocking archive.
tasks.verification: Added RED regression coverage for archive gate source mismatch: stale store projection with authoritative workflow gates complete must not block archive; authoritative workflow incomplete gates still block. RED confirmed stale-projection test failed before implementation with incomplete-gates error. GREEN after authoritative gate overlay: focused change tests pass (17/17).
tasks.summary: Extended change.test.ts with complete/incomplete gate fixtures, querySignal mock, and adv_change_archive tests for stale projection vs authoritative workflow gates.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended change.test.ts with complete/incomplete gate fixtures, querySignal mock, and adv_change_archive tests for stale projection vs authoritative workflow gates.

tasks.title: Implement archive gate-state source-of-truth refresh/overlay so stale cache/projection does not block valid archive while unknown/incomplete state remains blocked.
tasks.verification: Implemented archive authoritative gate overlay. adv_change_archive now queries the change workflow gate-status query using the same source path as adv_gate_status before running archive preflight. If queried gates exist, archive preflight and validation use that authoritative gate state; genuinely incomplete authoritative gates still block.
tasks.summary: Imported querySignal/getGateStatusQuery and added applyAuthoritativeArchiveGates helper in change.ts. adv_change_archive now applies queried workflow gates to the change object before getArchivePreflightError.
tasks.implementation_summary: Imported querySignal/getGateStatusQuery and added applyAuthoritativeArchiveGates helper in change.ts. adv_change_archive now applies queried workflow gates to the change object before getArchivePreflightError.

tasks.title: Run focused archive tests and plugin check; document verification evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts --reporter=verbose; pnpm run check

wisdom.content: Archive preflight must query workflow gate status via the same getGateStatusQuery path as adv_gate_status before enforcing allGatesSatisfied. Store/disk projections can lag after recovery; authoritative workflow gates should drive archive readiness while incomplete queried gates still block.

proposal.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #88.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed from issue #88, proposal, and project wisdom. Core fact: archive should rely on authoritative gate state or refresh stale projection/cache before blocking; stale cache/projection mismatch is likely failure mode. No conflict or user tradeoff found.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan uses authoritative gate-state overlay/refresh plus stale-cache and true-incomplete regression coverage. No HITL tradeoff, conflict, or contract compromise.

planning.approval_evidence: Planning approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #88.

execution.approval_evidence: Implemented archive authoritative gate-state overlay. adv_change_archive now queries workflow gate status via getGateStatusQuery before preflight, matching adv_gate_status source-of-truth behavior. Verification: RED stale-projection regression failed before fix; GREEN pnpm vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts --reporter=verbose passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit cea1d5df6753d443a343b2c4a89923f4ffb0f6c8.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes
